name: od-contribute
tagline: One-click, no-code contribution flow for Open Design: ship a Skill/Design System, translate docs, fix a typo/write a blog, or file a bug —.
verdict: Well-guarded: refuses force-push and pushes to protected branches, gates every push on explicit user confirmation, and validates before ever pushing. Only real flag is an undisclosed rule excluding a named GitHub user from contributor outreach, plus no version signal and a thin re-run/duplicate-PR safeguard.

highlights.summary: 'skip GitHub user `xxiaoxiong` from any contributor lookup' — an undisclosed, targeted exclusion rule not covered by the description.
'Each line is JSON' for the i18n-gap discovery output names fields (status, english_commits_since_translation) but shows no worked example line.
Branch names include a date but nothing checks for an already-open PR/issue before creating a new one on re-run.
